university.name: MBSC - Prince Mohammed Bin Salman College
university.motto: Excellence in Business Education, Innovation in Leadership

bannerText.shaping: Shaping Future Business Leaders of Saudi Arabia

about.title: About MBSC
about.description1: Mohammed Bin Salman College (MBSC) is a premier business institution in the heart of Riyadh, established as part of Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 initiative. We are committed to developing world-class business leaders who will drive the Kingdom's economic transformation.
about.description2: Our college offers cutting-edge business programs designed to meet the evolving needs of the global business landscape. With state-of-the-art facilities and partnerships with leading international institutions, MBSC provides an exceptional learning environment.
about.description3: Rooted in Saudi Arabian values while embracing global business practices, MBSC prepares students to excel in both local and international markets, contributing to the Kingdom's ambitious economic goals.

achievements.title: College Achievements
list: Ranked #1 Business College in Saudi Arabia
Partnership with MIT Sloan School of Management

officeHours.title: Office Hours
officeHours.emergencyNote: For urgent matters outside office hours, please contact our emergency hotline.

overview.title: Why Choose NexusHive ERP?
overview.description1: Our comprehensive CRM solution is designed specifically for marketing and sales organizations, providing everything you need to manage clients, teams, and business processes in one unified platform.
overview.description2: With advanced AI capabilities, real-time analytics, and seamless integration options, we help organizations streamline operations and enhance client success.
